title: What is x402 Protocol? Complete Beginner Guide
description: Learn what the x402 protocol is, how it enables machine-to-machine payments using HTTP 402, and why it matters for AI agent commerce.

title: How to Accept x402 Payments in Your API
description: Step-by-step tutorial on adding x402 payment support to your existing API endpoints with code examples.

title: x402 vs Traditional API Billing: Cost Comparison
description: Compare x402 micropayments against subscription models, API keys, and usage-based billing. See the real cost breakdown.

title: Building Your First x402 Service with Node.js
description: Build a complete x402-enabled API from scratch using Node.js, Express, and the x402 SDK. Full code walkthrough included.

title: UltravioletaDAO vs CDP Facilitator: Which to Choose
description: Compare the two main x402 facilitators — UltravioletaDAO and Coinbase CDP. Features, fees, and which is right for you.

title: How AI Agents Pay for Services with x402
description: Discover how autonomous AI agents use x402 to pay for APIs, data, and services without human intervention.

title: x402 Pricing Strategies: Maximizing Revenue
description: Learn how to price your x402 API endpoints for maximum revenue. Covers per-request pricing, tiered models, and market positioning.

title: Setting Up x402 on Base, Ethereum, and Solana
description: Guide to deploying x402 services across different blockchains. Compare gas costs, settlement speed, and ecosystem support.

title: x402 Bazaar: How Bots Discover Your API
description: Learn how x402 Bazaar works as a discovery layer for AI agents to find and consume your API services automatically.

title: USDC Micropayments with x402: Technical Deep Dive
description: Technical breakdown of how x402 processes USDC micropayments, including EIP-3009 authorization, facilitator verification, and settlement.

title: x402scan Marketplace: Getting Listed and Found
description: How to get your x402 service listed on x402scan, optimize your listing, and attract more AI agent customers.

title: Security Best Practices for x402 Services
description: Protect your x402 service from replay attacks, overpayment exploits, and facilitate verification bypasses. Essential security guide.

title: x402 Payment Flow Explained Step by Step
description: Visual walkthrough of the complete x402 payment flow from HTTP 402 response to USDC settlement. Every step explained.

title: Comparing x402 Facilitators: Features and Fees
description: Detailed comparison of all x402 facilitators including fee structures, supported chains, verification speed, and reliability.

title: The Future of AI Agent Commerce with x402
description: Explore where x402 and AI agent payments are heading. Market predictions, emerging use cases, and the road to autonomous commerce.
